title: [IV/MTS] NTM: Vehicles
description: An integration addon allowing Immersive Vehicles bullets trigger nuclear blasts!
body:
**NTM: Vehicles** is an integration addon allowing **[Immersive Vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)** to utilize **HBM's Nuclear Tech**'s Nuclear, Gas, and Napalm explosions!

## Compatability
- **[HBM's Nuclear Tech - Extended Edition](https://modrinth.com/plugin/ntm-extended)**
- **[HBM Nuclear Tech Mod: Community Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm-ce)**

## How to Use
### Nuclear
Add this to your constant values
```json
"constantValues": {
  "nuke": 1.0
}
```
The blast radius and fallout are calculated just like the explosive bullet type!

### Gas
Add this to your constant values
```json
"constantValues": {
  "gas": 1.0
}
```
The size is calculated just like the explosive bullet type! There are also extra values you can set, including `gasSpreadSpeed` and `gasType`!

### Napalm
Add this to your constant values
```json
"constantValues": {
  "napalm": 1.0
}
```
